job.title: Python Full Stack Developer (R-19632) @ Dun & Bradstreet (TS, IN)
job.description:
**Shape the Future with Dun & Bradstreet**

At Dun & Bradstreet, we believe data has the power to create a better tomorrow. As a global leader in business decisioning data and analytics, we help companies worldwide grow, manage risk, and innovate. For over 180 years, businesses have trusted us to turn uncertainty into opportunity. We’re a diverse, global team that values creativity, collaboration, and bold ideas. Are you ready to make an impact and help shape what’s next? Join us! Explore opportunities at dnb.com/careers.

**The Role:** We are seeking a highly skilled Full Stack Engineer to design, develop, and scale next-generation Data Quality and AI-enabled platforms. In this role, you will work across the entire technology stack—from intuitive user experiences and data visualizations to cloud-native backend services and data processing pipelines. You will partner closely with Data Quality SMEs, Data Engineers, Product Managers, Data Scientists, and Platform Teams to build solutions that support data observability, analytics, data governance, and AI-driven insights.

You will help build the next generation of D&B's Data Quality Insights platform, enabling data governance, observability, analytics, and AI-powered decision support for enterprise data products.

### **Key Responsibilities:**

**Full stack Application Development**

* Design and develop modern, responsive web applications and drive the end-to-end development of scalable full-stack solutions using React, TypeScript, and Python (FastAPI), delivering high-performance web applications, APIs, microservices, analytics dashboards, data platform integrations, and AI-powered capabilities in partnership with Product, Data Engineering, Architecture, and Platform teams.

**Data Quality & Analytics**

* Build and enhance next-generation Data Quality and Governance platform that enables rule management, observability, metadata-driven monitoring, policy enforcement, and AI-powered insights. Develop scalable capabilities (front-end and back-end) for data quality assessment, anomaly detection, lineage, governance workflows, and self-service analytics, transforming business requirements into extensible enterprise-grade solutions.

**Cloud Engineering & DevOps**

* Build cloud-native applications using GCP. Containerize applications using GKE and orchestrate deployments through CI/CD pipelines, preferably Terraform. Implement Infrastructure-as-Code and engineering best practices. Participate in operational excellence activities, monitoring, reliability, and platform optimization.

**AI & automation**

* Integrate Generative AI and Agentic AI capabilities into engineering solutions. Collaborate with Data Scientists and AI teams to operationalize AI/ML models. Develop AI-powered workflows, anomaly detection solutions, and intelligent user experiences. Build and integrate LLM-enabled services, copilots, and automation capabilities where appropriate.

**Engineering Governance**

* Write clean, maintainable, and testable code. Develop automated unit, integration, and end-to-end tests. Perform code reviews, technical documentation and contribute to engineering standards and best practices. Champion security, scalability, performance, and accessibility standards. Participate in architectural discussions and comply to Agile/Scrum practices.

### **Key Requirements:**

* 5-8 years of professional full‑stack/software engineering development experience with demonstrated ownership of end‑to‑end systems.
* Strong experience in modern frontend development using React/Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5/CSS3
* Strong backend development experience using Python, FastAPI or Flask
* Strong SQL skills with experience developing analytical queries against large-scale datasets.
* Experience designing and developing REST APIs, Microservices architectures, Event-driven systems
* Experience with databases PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB or equivalent NoSQL technologies
* Experience with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, Terraform, Git-based development workflows
* Experience building and deploying applications on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) including BigQuery, Composer (Airflow), Cloud Storage, Pub/Sub, Dataproc, Dataflow and GKE. Experience with Terraform and Infrastructure-as-Code is highly preferred.
* Strong testing fundamentals across the stack (unit, integration, E2E).
* Solid understanding of Git workflows and development tooling (npm/yarn etc).
* Familiarity with data pipelines, ETL/ELT processing, metadata-driven architectures, observability frameworks, and large-scale analytical platforms.
* Strong grounding in web security, including authentication, authorization, and secure API communication.
* Strong problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills.
* Ability to work independently and in cross-functional teams.
* Focus on quality, performance, and maintainability.

This position internally titles as Software Engineer II

All Dun & Bradstreet job postings can be found at https://jobs.lever.co/dnb. Official communication from Dun & Bradstreet will come from an email address ending in @dnb.com.

Notice to Applicants: Please be advised that this job posting page is hosted and powered by Lever, a subsidiary of Employ Inc. Your use of this page is subject to Employ's Privacy Notice and Cookie Policy, which governs the processing of visitor data on this platform.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please visit https://bit.ly/3LMn4CQ.

job.title: Laravel Developer @ Param Software (GJ, IN)
job.description:
* Rajkot
* Full Time

**Job Details**
---------------

**Job Overview**

We are looking for an experienced **Full Stack Laravel Developer** who is proficient in developing and maintaining robust ERP solutions. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in full-stack development using Laravel and a good understanding of business logic in ERP systems.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, and maintain high-quality web applications using Laravel.

* Work on customized ERP solutions tailored to client requirements.

* Collaborate with front-end developers, UI/UX designers, and other backend developers.

* Integrate third-party APIs and tools as needed.

* Ensure code quality through unit testing and peer code reviews.

* Participate in the full software development lifecycle: requirement gathering, architecture design, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance.

* Troubleshoot, test, and maintain the core product software and databases to ensure strong optimization and functionality.

* Document the development process, architecture, and standard components.

**Required Skills & Qualifications**

* Minimum **3 years of hands-on experience** with the Laravel framework.

* Solid understanding of **PHP**, **MySQL**, and **OOP concepts**.

* Experience in **ERP development** will be a strong advantage.

* Proficient in front-end technologies like **HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Vue.js or React**.

* Familiarity with **version control tools** like Git.

* Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently.

* Good communication and collaboration skills.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Prior experience with **RESTful APIs** and **Microservices Architecture**.

* Knowledge of **Laravel Framework.**

* Understanding of **Agile/Scrum methodologies**.

* Exposure to **cloud platforms** like AWS or Azure is a plus.

**Location Preference**

* Candidates **residing in Rajkot** will be given **first preference**.

* Applicants from other locations must be **willing to relocate** to Rajkot.

**Why Join Us?**

* Be part of a growing and innovative team.

* Work on impactful projects with real-world applications.

* Friendly and collaborative work environment.

* Opportunities for continuous learning and career growth.

**To Apply:**

Send your updated resume to hr@paramsoftware.com with the subject line “Application for Laravel Developer – Rajkot”.

##### **Job Overview**

* ###### **Location:**

  Rajkot
* ###### **Job Type:**

  Full Time

job.title: Computer Scientist I - Full Stack @ Adobe (KA, IN)
job.description:
The Adobe Developer Platform (ADP) team builds the tools, APIs, SDKs, CLIs, and runtime infrastructure that enable third-party developers and internal teams to extend and integrate with Adobe's products. This includes Adobe Developer Console, Developer Distribution, App Builder, I/O Events, Developer Docs and Exchange. Our team is the connective tissue between Adobe's products and the broader developer ecosystem, making it easy for developers to build powerful applications and integrations on top of Adobe's platform.
  
  
Millions of developers rely on the surfaces we build — from the developer portal at developer.adobe.com to the Developer Console where teams manage API credentials, extensions, and integrations. We move fast, care deeply about developer experience, and hold ourselves to a high bar for UI quality, performance, and reliability across the stack. Our work directly shapes how the developer community perceives and adopts Adobe technology.
  
  
We are looking for a Full Stack Software Engineer to join the ADP group. You will contribute across the entire stack, from React-based experiences developers use to the services and APIs that support them. You'll work alongside product managers, designers, and fellow engineers to ship end-to-end features, owning your work from UI to backend to deployment.
  
What You'll Do
  
Design, develop, and test features end-to-end across ADP surfaces, including developer.adobe.com, Developer Console, and Adobe Exchange.
  
Build responsive, accessible frontend experiences in React while also developing the backend services and APIs that support them.
  
Develop scalable, reliable services and integrations using Node.js and/or other backend technologies, deployed on cloud and serverless infrastructure.
  
Participate in build reviews and code reviews, driving engineering guidelines across both frontend and backend.
  
Collaborate closely with product management and design to translate requirements into well-architected, maintainable solutions.
  
Investigate and resolve production issues across the stack, contributing to operational excellence and monitoring.
  
Write automated tests and contribute to shared libraries, documentation, and engineering standards.
  
What You Need To Succeed
  
  
Required
  
Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field with 4-6 years of professional software development experience.
  
Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, with hands-on experience building web applications in React.
  
Solid backend development experience with Java (or a comparable server-side technology such as Node.js).
  
Experience designing, building, and consuming REST APIs.
  
Working knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure) and modern deployment practices.
  
Understanding of HTML, CSS, and responsive, accessible web design principles.
  
Strong problem-solving ability, good communication skills, and comfort working across the full stack in an agile environment.
  
  
Nice to Have
  
Experience with Adobe's React Spectrum design system or similar component library ecosystems.
  
Familiarity with serverless runtimes, microservices, or event-driven architectures.
  
Experience with developer tooling, API platforms, CLIs, or developer portal experiences.
  
Exposure to CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and infrastructure-as-code.
  
Experience working in a platform or ecosystem team serving external developers.
  
About Adobe
  
Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
  
  
Our 30,000+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
  
  
Let’s Adobe together
  
At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture , focus on people, purpose and community , Adobe for All , comprehensive benefits programs , the stories we tell , the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
  
  
Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
  
  
Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call +1 408-536-3015.
  
  
**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**  
Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
  
  
At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience .

job.title: Frontend Developer (React / TypeScript) — iTakeControl @ Red Nucleus (MH, IN)
job.description:
**Red Nucleus is hiring a Frontend Developer (React/TypeScript) - iTakeControl to join our global team. This role will be fully onsite at our Pune office.** **There may be flexibility to transition to a hybrid work model in the future, based on business requirements.**

  

Our purpose is advancing knowledge to improve lives. We succeed by being the premier provider of strategic learning and development, scientific advisory services, and medical communications solutions for the life sciences industry. Our global team is composed of nearly 800 full-time employees whose commitment to creativity, quality, and on-time delivery is unrivaled in our space.

  

At Red Nucleus, we believe in providing a rich working environment that pushes us to innovate in ways that engages our employees to be their best selves. Our culture is about meaningful work, a true sense of community, and fun. We love to celebrate our people and we are proud to have been Internationally recognized as a “Great Place to Work".

  

**How You Will Contribute**

In this position, you will be working with our Clinical Research team. For more information, please visit ITC I Red Nucleus.

**Job Overview**

iTakeControl is a clinical trial platform supporting live studies within a validated, GxP-compliant environment. We are bringing the platform fully in-house and building the team that will own and grow it.

  

We are looking for a strong Frontend Developer to own and advance the platform’s web interfaces as a hands-on, code-first contributor. The platform spans several substantial frontends — an operator-facing administration portal, a participant-facing web experience, and a registration experience — built on a modern React stack with a shared component library. Working under the technical direction of the Technical Lead, you will write production-quality frontend code, maintain a high bar for usability and accessibility, and help keep a live regulated platform stable, performant, and reliable.

  

The role begins by building a deep working understanding of the existing interfaces during the handover from the outgoing vendor, then moves into ongoing feature development, refactoring, and UI quality work within the established compliance framework. It is a delivery-focused role for an experienced frontend engineer who takes ownership of their work and cares about the details — performance, accessibility, and visual consistency — on a platform where clarity and correctness carry regulatory weight.

  

**The nature of this role:** this is a frontend software-engineering position. The day-to-day work is designing and maintaining large, stateful single-page applications — application architecture, complex client-side state, data-heavy interactive interfaces, performance tuning, and automated testing. It goes well beyond HTML/CSS markup, templating, or responsive styling: we are looking for someone who reasons about and structures frontend application code, not only its presentation layer. Strong HTML5/CSS3 and responsive skills are expected, but they are the floor, not the role.

  

The role works with US-based stakeholders and requires **regular overlap with US hours** , particularly around releases.

**What You’ll Own**

* **Hands-on frontend delivery** — building and maintaining features across the platform’s React web applications to a production-quality standard
* **Component library and design consistency** — contributing to and maintaining a shared component library so UI patterns stay consistent across applications
* **UI quality** — responsive layout, accessibility, cross-browser correctness, performance, and visual consistency
* **Frontend stability and performance** — troubleshooting production UI issues, optimising rendering and bundle size, and contributing to the long-term technical health of the frontend
* **Compliance-aware development** — building interfaces within the validated environment, preserving the clarity, auditability, and data-integrity expectations the platform requires
* **Codebase fluency** — building a deep working understanding of the existing interfaces during the vendor handover and keeping documentation current for the areas you own
* **Collaboration** — participating in code reviews and design discussions, working closely with backend engineers on API contracts, and partnering with QA on frontend test coverage

**What We’re Looking For**

This is a hands-on engineering role. We are looking for proven, production frontend capability across the areas below — what you can do matters more than titles held.

  

**Core Engineering Skills (must-have)**

* **React application engineering** — strong, current, hands-on experience designing and building large single-page applications in React (we run a current React version). You understand how React actually renders and re-renders, design components that stay composable and performant as the application grows, and make sound architectural decisions rather than only wiring components together
* **State management at scale** — designing predictable, maintainable application state for a large, multi-feature app (we use Redux Toolkit): normalised data, derived state, and async/server-data lifecycles — and the judgement to avoid the state bugs that surface at scale
* **TypeScript and modern JavaScript** — strong asynchronous JavaScript and applied TypeScript (typing components, props, state, and API contracts); expert-level HTML5 and CSS3 with responsive and adaptive layout as a baseline
* **Frontend performance** — profiling real applications and fixing what you find: unnecessary re-renders, slow rendering of large data sets, oversized bundles, and load-time problems
* **Complex, data-heavy UI** — hands-on with enterprise data grids (e.g. ag-Grid, MUI X DataGrid): server-side/infinite row models, virtualised rendering, custom cell renderers and editors, and column sorting, filtering, grouping, and aggregation. Comfortable building interactive dashboards and charts (e.g. ECharts), configurable/draggable layouts, and schema- or rule-driven multi-step forms with conditional fields and client-side validation — always handling loading, error, empty, and edge states correctly
* **Application structure and maintainability** — client-side routing in a large app, clear module/feature boundaries, separation of concerns, and keeping a large codebase coherent over time
* **Component-driven development** — designing reusable, composable, accessible components and working within a theming/design-system approach (we use MUI). Documenting and visually testing components in a tool like Storybook, and maintaining a shared component library versioned across multiple applications
* **Accessibility and cross-browser quality** — building accessible (WCAG-aware) interfaces that behave correctly across browsers, devices, and screen sizes
* **Automated frontend testing** — writing component/unit tests that assert behaviour rather than implementation detail, plus end-to-end and visual-regression coverage, and shipping features together with their tests
* **Modern build tooling** — working fluently with module systems, bundlers, and frontend build pipelines
* **API integration** — consuming RESTful and/or real-time APIs, modelling client-side data, and collaborating with backend engineers on contracts
* **Version control and collaboration** — strong Git workflows and a habit of writing reviewable, well-documented code

**Delivery and Quality Mindset**

* Writes production-quality frontend code daily and takes ownership of it through to production
* Cares about the user experience: performance, accessibility, and visual polish
* Plans realistically and keeps the team informed on progress, risks, and trade-offs
* Brings sound engineering judgement to a live, regulated platform, valuing well-tested, reliable changes
Collaborates well with backend, QA, design, and product, and is willing to support and mentor less experienced team members  

**Preferred Qualifications**

* **Component library / design system tooling** — experience building and documenting components in a tool such as Storybook
* **Visual regression and e2e testing** — experience with frameworks such as Playwright or equivalent
* **Internationalisation** — experience building multi-language interfaces (i18n)
* **Video / real-time UI** — experience integrating video calling, WebRTC, or other real-time features into a web frontend
* **Server-side React frameworks** — experience with Next.js or similar
* **Offline-capable web apps** — experience with client-side storage, resumable uploads, or offline-first patterns
* **Regulated or healthcare environment** — experience working within HIPAA, GxP, FDA 21 CFR Part 11, or equivalent frameworks
* **Vendor takeover / legacy stabilisation** — experience joining an existing system from an external vendor or stabilising a legacy frontend
* **AI-assisted development** — practical, transparent use of AI tooling to improve delivery

**Education and Experience**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent hands-on experience)
* 6+ years of hands-on frontend development, with strong, current, production React experience building single-page applications (not primarily markup, templating, or static/content-driven UI)
* Proven track record of independently delivering production frontend features end to end, including their state management and test coverage
* Experience maintaining a large, stateful, established frontend application
* Experience operating in a live, customer-facing production system where UI defects have real consequences
* Experience working within regulated or validated software environments preferred
Experience in Life Sciences, Clinical Trials, Healthcare IT, or Medical Devices a plus  

*\*This job description captures the essential functions of this role as of July 2026. Management reserves the right to modify it as the platform and team evolve.\**

  

**What You Will Enjoy at Red Nucleus**

* Competitive pay, incentives, retirement, and income security programs
* Comprehensive benefits and wellness programs focused on healthy lifestyles
* Generous paid time off, employee assistance programs and flexible work arrangements
* Performance driven environment including professional development and transfer opportunities
* People first culture fostering self expression, diversity, and a growth mindset
* Celebrations! We love to celebrate service anniversaries, holidays, diversity and inclusion events, project milestones and anything else that is meaningful to our employees
* Support of the community organizations you are passionate about
Ongoing programs and events designed to bring our global team together  

*Diversity, equity and inclusion are valued at Red Nucleus and we believe we have a shared responsibility to provide equal opportunity and foster an inclusive spirit. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, national origin, religion, caste, sexual orientation, gender, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.*

#LI-SS1

job.title: QA Analyst I (Hybrid Work Model) @ Quorum Business Solutions (MH, IN)
job.description:
**QA Analyst I - DaWinci**

**Location: Pune, India**

**Model of Work: Hybrid**

**About Quorum Software**

Quorum Software connects people and information across the energy value chain. Twenty years ago, we built the first software for gas plant accountants. Pipeline operators came next, followed by land administrators, pumpers, and planners. Since 1998, Quorum has helped thousands of energy workers with business workflows that optimize profitability and growth. Our vision for the future connects the global energy ecosystem through cloud-first software, data standards, and integration. The trusted source of decision-ready data for 1,800+ companies, Quorum Software makes the essential connections that let us work better together in the connected energy workplace. For more information, visit quorumsoftware.com

**Be a part of our legacy**

Quorum Software is the world's largest provider of digital technology focused solely on business workflows that empower the next evolution of energy. From emerging companies to supermajors, throughout every region of the globe, customers rely on Quorum's proven innovation and unmatched global expertise to streamline business operations and make data-driven decisions that optimize profitability and growth. Our industry-leading solutions are transforming energy companies across the entire value chain, helping visionary leaders evolve their organizations into modern energy companies.

**Who we are looking for:**

Are you excited by challenges? Do you enjoy working in a fast-paced, international and dynamic environment? Then now is the time to join Quorum Software, a rapidly growing company and industry leader in oil & gas transformation.

**Job Purpose**

We're looking for a high-energy, versatile QA Engineer who doesn't just execute test cases — they drive quality. You'll be joining a team that works across a broad and evolving tech stack, takes on new initiatives, and moves fast. If you're someone who speaks up, jumps in, and thrives in dynamic environments, this role is for you*.*

**What You Will Do:**

* Design, develop, and maintain scalable **UI automation frameworks using Selenium (Java)** — this is your primary focus.
* Own end-to-end testing activities across features and releases — without waiting to be told what to do.
* Actively participate in and drive **bug triages** — advocate for quality, prioritize defects with business context, and push for timely resolution.
* Integrate automated test suites into CI/CD pipelines.
* Contribute to and eventually **drive QA initiatives** — not just execute them.
* Leverage and explore **AI-powered tools** (Claude, GitHub Copilot, self-healing frameworks) to improve testing efficiency and coverage.
* Understand the urgency behind releases and escalations — respond with speed and clarity.
* Collaborate confidently with developers, product managers, and stakeholders; communicate test status, risks, and blockers proactively.
* And other duties as assigned.

**What to Bring:**

* 2–4 years of hands-on experience in QA automation.
* Strong proficiency with **Selenium WebDriver and Java** — UI automation is the core of this role.
* Experience with test frameworks such as **TestNG or JUnit**.
* Familiarity with CI/CD tools like **Jenkins or GitHub Actions**.
* Solid understanding of the **QA lifecycle, SDLC, Agile methodologies, and bug advocacy**.
* Exposure to AI tools like **Claude or GitHub Copilot** in a testing or development context — or a strong eagerness to adopt them.
* **Confident communicator** — able to present clearly in team discussions, bug triages, and stakeholder conversations.

**Beyond the tech skills, we need someone who is:**

* A self-starter — sees what needs to be done and does it, without waiting for direction.
* Confident in communication — speaks up in meetings, flags risks early, and represents QA with conviction.
* An eager learner — our stack is growing (Selenium, Java, JMeter, Claude, Copilot) and so should you.
* Initiative-driven — we have new QA initiatives in motion and need someone who can co-own and execute them.
* Adaptable — willing to jump in wherever the team needs, no task is too big or too small.
* Urgency-aware — understands when something is critical and responds accordingly.

**Good to Have**

* Experience with API testing — manual and/or automated (Postman, RestAssured, or similar).
* Experience with mobile testing — manual and/or automated.
* Hands-on with performance testing using JMeter.
* Experience with AI-powered testing
* Prior experience co-leading or driving QA initiatives within a team.

**Additional Details**

* Visa Sponsorship: Employment eligibility to work with Quorum Software in India is required as the company will not pursue visa sponsorship for this position.

**Quorum Diversity Statement:** At Quorum, we are committed to fostering, cultivating, and preserving a culture of belonging. We want to be the place where a diverse pool of talented people join us, stay with us and do their best work. With a diverse team of employees, we grow and learn better together. The collective sum of the individual differences, life experiences, knowledge, innovation, self-expression, and talent that our employees invest in their work represents not only part of our culture, but our reputation and our achievements. We are fully focused on equity and equality and believe deeply in diversity of race, gender, sexual orientation, age, religion, ethnicity, national origin, ability, neurodiversity and all the other characteristics that make us unique.

*Quorum Business Solutions and Quorum Software are Equal Opportunity Employers. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, veteran status, disability, genetic information, or any other basis protected by law.*

**Those applicants requiring reasonable accommodation to the application and/or interview process should notify a member of the Human Resources Department**

job.description:

Job Summary
  
  
We are currently looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer with 10-15 years of professional experience to join our dynamic FinCrime & Cyber team in Bangalore. In this pivotal role, you will be responsible for designing and implementing innovative, secure, and scalable applications that support financial crime prevention and cyber investigations. You will utilize a wide range of technologies including cutting-edge frameworks and tools, with opportunities to incorporate GenAI and AI engineering solutions to revolutionize intelligent investigation workflows.
  
  
Your expertise in building robust data engineering pipelines, leveraging platforms such as Databricks, will be essential as you create automated, efficient solutions that enhance operational resilience and reduce investigation times. This is an exciting chance to apply your skills in a meaningful way that directly impacts the security and integrity of financial services on a global scale.
  
  
The role demands a balance between technical proficiency and collaborative engagement, as you will work closely with cross-disciplinary teams including analysts, investigators, and risk experts. You’ll contribute to advancing our digital transformation initiatives and have a unique opportunity to explore and apply emerging technologies within the fast-evolving FinCrime and Cybersecurity landscape.
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  
Strategy
  

* Contribute to the FinCrime & Cyber technology strategy by building full stack applications that align with business goals and digital transformation priorities.
* Explore emerging technologies such as GenAI, vector databases, and AI-driven assistants to enhance investigative efficiency.

Business
  

* Collaborate with analysts, investigators, and risk teams to translate business needs into technical solutions.
* Develop features that improve case management, fraud detection, and cyber defense workflows.
* Ensure applications deliver measurable value in reducing investigation time and improving operational resilience.

Processes
  

* Design and develop full stack applications using Node.js, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, PostgreSQL.
* Build scalable APIs and backend services to integrate with case management platforms and investigative tools.
* Support data engineering workflows with Python, Airflow , and Databricks (Must Have)
* Build AI Agentic Apps with frameworks like Google ADK, Langgraph, Langchain etc.
* Deploy and maintain applications with Docker/Podman and orchestrate on Kubernetes.
* Apply DevSecOps practices , ensuring s ecure coding, automated testing, and CI/CD pipelines.

People and Talent
  

* Work closely with cross-functional teams, providing technical mentorship and knowledge sharing where needed.
* Contribute to a culture of collaboration, continuous learning, and innovation within the FinCrime & Cyber team.

Risk Management
  

* Build applications that adhere to cybersecurity and data privacy standards.
* Identify and mitigate risks in software design, deployment, and integration.
* Ensure secure authentication, authorization, and audit trails are embedded in applications.

Governance
  

* Participate in code reviews, architectural discussions, and design approvals to ensure compliance with technology standards.
* Maintain documentation, version control, and consistent coding practices aligned with enterprise policies.

Regulatory and Business Conduct
  

* Display exemplary conduct and live by the Group’s Values and Code of Conduct.
* Take personal responsibility for embedding the highest standards of ethics, including regulatory and business conduct, across Standard Chartered Bank. This includes understanding and ensuring compliance with, in letter and spirit, all applicable laws, regulations, guidelines and the Group Code of Conduct.
* Effectively and collaboratively identify, escalate, mitigate and resolve risk, conduct and compliance matters.

Key stakeholders
  

* FCSO
* FRM
* Cyber Operations

Skills and Experience
  
  
The ideal candidate will possess a strong combination of technical expertise, practical experience, and a passion for innovation in the context of financial crime prevention and cybersecurity. Key skills and experience include:
  
  
Proven experience with Databricks, Nifi, Kafka, and Splunk to build and monitor scalable data-driven applications and pipelines.
  
Extensive frontend development skills using frameworks such as Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS to deliver intuitive and accessible user interfaces.
  
Robust backend development experience with Node.js and PostgreSQL, including API design and integration with complex systems.
  
Hands-on expertise in AI engineering, machine learning concepts, and their application in real-world investigative scenarios.
  
Strong understanding of data engineering principles , including workflow orchestration tools like Apache Airflow and the ability to develop and maintain data pipelines.
  
Experience with containerization technologies (Docker, Podman) and orchestration platforms such as Kubernetes.
  
A solid grasp of DevSecOps practices, with a focus on secure coding, automated testing, and CI/CD methodologies to deliver reliable and secure applications.
  
Familiarity with AI agentic app frameworks such as Google ADK, LangGraph, and LangChain is desirable.
  
Demonstrated ability to work collaboratively in cross-functional teams, with excellent communication and mentoring capabilities.
  
  
This blend of skills will enable you to develop cutting-edge technologies that safeguard financial ecosystems, while supporting your continued professional growth and development within a leading global bank.
  
  
Qualifications
  
  
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline from a recognized institution.
  
  
10–15 years of professional experience in software engineering, application development, and enterprise technology delivery, preferably within Banking, Financial Services, Financial Crime, Risk, Compliance, or Cyber Security domains.
  
  
Proven ability to work in Agile and cross-functional environments , with strong stakeholder management, problem-solving, leadership, communication, governance, and regulatory compliance experience.
  
  
About Standard Chartered
  
  
We're an international bank, nimble enough to act, big enough for impact. For more than 170 years, we've worked to make a positive difference for our clients, communities, and each other. We question the status quo, love a challenge and enjoy finding new opportunities to grow and do better than before. If you're looking for a career with purpose and you want to work for a bank making a difference, we want to hear from you. You can count on us to celebrate your unique talents and we can't wait to see the talents you can bring us.
  
  
Our purpose, to drive commerce and prosperity through our unique diversity, together with our brand promise, to be here for good are achieved by how we each live our valued behaviours. When you work with us, you'll see how we value difference and advocate inclusion.
  
  
**Together we:**  
Do the right thing and are assertive, challenge one another, and live with integrity, while putting the client at the heart of what we do
  
Never settle, continuously striving to improve and innovate, keeping things simple and learning from doing well, and not so well
  
Are better together, we can be ourselves, be inclusive, see more good in others, and work collectively to build for the long term
  
What we offer
  
  
In line with our Fair Pay Charter, we offer a competitive salary and benefits to support your mental, physical, financial and social wellbeing.
  
  
Core bank funding for retirement savings, medical and life insurance, with flexible and voluntary benefits available in some locations.
  
Time-off including annual leave, parental/maternity (20 weeks), sabbatical (12 months maximum) and volunteering leave (3 days), along with minimum global standards for annual and public holiday, which is combined to 30 days minimum.
  
Flexible working options based around home and office locations, with flexible working patterns.
  
Proactive wellbeing support through Unmind, a market-leading digital wellbeing platform, development courses for resilience and other human skills, global Employee Assistance Programme, sick leave, mental health first-aiders and all sorts of self-help toolkits
  
A continuous learning culture to support your growth, with opportunities to reskill and upskill and access to physical, virtual and digital learning.
  
Being part of an inclusive and values driven organisation, one that embraces and celebrates our unique diversity, across our teams, business functions and geographies - everyone feels respected and can realise their full potential.

job.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer (.NET & Angular) @ BMC Software (MH, IN)
job.description:
Basic Information
  
  
Job Name
  
Product Developer II - India
  
  
Country
  
India
  
  
State
  
IN\_Maharashtra
  
  
City
  
Pune
  
  
Date Published
  
08-Jul-2026
  
  
Job ID
  
47240
  
  
Travel
  
You may occasionally be required to travel for business
  
  
Looking for details about our benefits?
  
  
Description and Requirements
  
  
CareerArc Code
  
CA-JF
  
  
**Hybrid:** #LI-Hybrid
  
  
BMC empowers nearly 80% of the Forbes Global 100 to accelerate business value, faster than humanly possible. Our industry-leading portfolio unlocks human and machine potential to drive business growth, innovation, and sustainable success. BMC does this in a simple and optimized way by connecting people, systems, and data that power the world’s largest organizations so they can seize a competitive advantage.
  
  
BMC is building and enhancing enterprise-grade security software focused on security log management, alerting, and SIEM capabilities. This role sits within the R&D team and is responsible for developing high-quality, scalable, and secure web applications that help enterprise customers monitor, manage, and respond to security events effectively. As a Developer, you will work on modern web application development using .NET, C#, Angular, TypeScript, SQL, REST APIs, and secure coding practices, contributing to a high-impact security product used in complex enterprise environments.
  
  
Here is how, through this exciting role, YOU will contribute to BMC's and your own success:
  
  

* Design, develop, and maintain enterprise-grade .NET web applications using C#, ASP.NET, MVC, and .NET Core.
* Build intuitive, responsive, and scalable user interfaces using Angular, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, RxJS, and modern UI frameworks.
* Work on applications supporting security log management, alerting, and SIEM-related use cases.
* Develop and integrate applications with RESTful services, JSON-based data flows, and SQL-based databases such as SQLite or MS SQL Server.
* Write clean, secure, scalable, and maintainable code aligned with engineering best practices.
* Apply debugging, unit testing, and end-to-end testing practices to ensure application stability and quality.
* Participate in code reviews, technical discussions, and Agile/Scrum ceremonies.
* Contribute to performance optimization, usability improvements, and secure web application development.
* Stay current with emerging technologies, including GenAI/AI-ML tools and engineering productivity enablers.

To ensure you’re set up for success, you will bring the following skillset & experience:
  
  

* 6+ years of overall software engineering experience, with strong hands-on development in enterprise web applications.
* Strong experience in C#, ASP.NET, MVC, .NET Core, and modern .NET application development.
* Strong front-end engineering experience with Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, and Angular CLI.
* Experience with RxJS, state management concepts, SPA/PWA application patterns, and modern UI development workflows.
* Good understanding of object-oriented analysis and design, clean coding principles, and scalable application architecture.
* Hands-on experience with REST APIs, JSON integration, SQL queries, and SQL-based databases such as SQLite or MS SQL Server.
* Experience using engineering tools such as Visual Studio, VS Code, Jira, Git/GitHub, npm, and NuGet.
* Practical exposure to unit testing, end-to-end testing, debugging, and application quality practices.
* Basic understanding of CI/CD pipelines, deployment practices, Agile, and Scrum delivery models.
* Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, communication skills, and ability to work collaboratively in a global engineering team.
* Prior exposure to secure web development practices such as protection against XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, and related vulnerabilities will be highly valuable.

Whilst these are nice to have, our team can help you develop in the following skills:
  
  

* Prior experience with Security Information and Event Management — SIEM — systems.
* Experience working on security products, enterprise security platforms, log management, alerting, or threat monitoring tools.
* Exposure to IBM z/OS mainframe operating system or mainframe security environments.
* Experience with MS Orleans, MS Kestrel, .NET v7+, and cross-platform .NET development.
* Exposure to Boost, TCP, UDP, TLS, certificates, Secure Apache Web Server, or Linux-based development.
* Experience with Jenkins or other CI/CD automation tools.
* Experience developing and maintaining APIs.
* Knowledge of Material Design, Bootstrap, Angular UI libraries, PWAs, or SPAs.
* Exposure to AI/ML or GenAI technologies, including use of AI tools for development productivity or Python-based AI/ML development.

Our commitment to you!
  
  
BMC’s culture is built around its people. We have 6000+ brilliant minds working together across the globe. You won’t be known just by your employee number, but for your true authentic self. BMC lets you be YOU!
  
  
If after reading the above, You’re unsure if you meet the qualifications of this role but are deeply excited about BMC and this team, we still encourage you to apply! We want to attract talents from diverse backgrounds and experience to ensure we face the world together with the best ideas!
  
  
BMC is committed to equal opportunity employment regardless of race, age, sex, creed, color, religion, citizenship status, sexual orientation, gender, gender expression, gender identity, national origin, disability, marital status, pregnancy, disabled veteran or status as a protected veteran. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application and hiring process, visit the accommodation request page.
  
  
BMC Software maintains a strict policy of not requesting any form of payment in exchange for employment opportunities, upholding a fair and ethical hiring process.
  
  
At BMC we believe in pay transparency and have set the midpoint of the salary band for this role at 2,117,800 INR. Actual salaries depend on a wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions, including but not limited to skill sets; experience and training, licensure, and certifications; and other business and organizational needs.
  
  
The salary listed is just one component of BMC's employee compensation package. Other rewards may include a variable plan and country specific benefits.
  
  
We are committed to ensuring that our employees are paid fairly and equitably, and that we are transparent about our compensation practices.
  
  
( Returnship@BMC )
  
  
Had a break in your career? No worries. This role is eligible for candidates who have taken a break in their career and want to re-enter the workforce. If your expertise matches the above job, visit to https://bmcrecruit.avature.net/returnship know more and how to apply.
  
  
Min salary
  
1,588,350
  
  
Mid point salary
  
2,117,800
  
  
Max salary
  
2,647,250
  
  
Min Salary - NEW
  
1,588,350
  
  
Max Salary - NEW
  
2,647,250
